validation:is-false.doc:name: date cannot be used together with from or to
validation:is-false.expression: #[(vars.queryParams.date != null) and (vars.queryParams.from != null and vars.queryParams.to != null)]
validation:is-false.message: date cannot be used together with from or to

validation:is-false.doc:name: from requires to
validation:is-false.expression: #[(vars.queryParams.from != null and vars.queryParams.to == null) or (vars.queryParams.from == null and vars.queryParams.to != null)]

validation:is-false.doc:name: At least one date filter is required
validation:is-false.expression: #[vars.queryParams.date == null and vars.queryParams.from == null and vars.queryParams.to == null]
validation:is-false.message: At least one date filter is required

validation:is-false.doc:name: from must be before to
validation:is-false.expression: #[(vars.queryParams.from != null and vars.queryParams.to != null) and (vars.queryParams.from > vars.queryParams.to )]

logger.doc:name: Validations Passed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Query Param received is valid", userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO","Validation Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:select.doc:name: Select meals
db:select.db:sql: SELECT m.meal_id, m.user_id, m.meal_type, m.consumed_at, m.logged_at as meal_logged_at, mi.item_id, mi.food_id, mi.portion_id, mi.portion_amount, mi.quantity_g, mi.logged_at as item_logged_at FROM meals m LEFT JOIN meal_items mi ON m.meal_id = mi.meal_id WHERE m.user_id = :userId AND m.consumed_at >= (:startDate::date + TIME '00:00:00') AT TIME ZONE :timezone AND m.consumed_at < (:endDate::date + TIME '00:00:00' + INTERVAL '1 day') AT TIME ZONE :timezone AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND (mi.deleted_at IS NULL OR mi.item_id IS NULL)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { counts: sizeOf(payload), meals: payload groupBy ((item) -> item.meal_type ) pluck ((value, key ) ->{ "meal_id": value[0].meal_id, "user_id": value[0].user_id, "meal_type": value[0].meal_type, "consumed_at": value[0].consumed_at, "meal_logged_at": value[0].meal_logged_at, "items": value map ((item) -> { "item_id": item.item_id, "food_id": item.food_id, "portion_id": item.portion_id, "portion_amount": item.portion_amount, "quantity_g": item.quantity_g, "item_logged_at": item.item_logged_at }) } ) }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-404", message: "No data found for the provided user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}, originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid QueryParam
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Query Param received is invalid", userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","Validation Not Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "MEALS-LOG-400", message: error.description replace("\n") with (" and "), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: DB:BAD_SQL_SYNTAX, DB:CONNECTIVITY, DB:QUERY_EXECUTION, DB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, VALIDATION:MULTIPLE, EXPRESSION, STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED

logger.doc:name: An error occurred retrieving meals
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","An error occurred retrieving meals",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "An error occurred retrieving meals", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

validation:is-false.doc:name: Check Meal Id
validation:is-false.message: Invalid meal Id format. Must be a valid UUID.

db:select.doc:name: Select meals
db:select.db:sql: SELECT m.meal_id, m.user_id, m.meal_type, m.consumed_at, m.logged_at as meal_logged_at, mi.item_id, mi.food_id, mi.portion_id, mi.portion_amount, mi.quantity_g, mi.logged_at as item_logged_at FROM meals m LEFT JOIN meal_items mi ON m.meal_id = mi.meal_id WHERE m.meal_id = :meal_id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND (mi.deleted_at IS NULL OR mi.item_id IS NULL)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 import transformMeal from dwl::transforms output application/json --- transformMeal(payload)

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-404", message: "No data found for the provided user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}, originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid Meal Id
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","meal Id received is invalid",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "MEALS-LOG-400", message: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: An error occurred retrieving meals
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","An error occurred retrieving meal",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "An error occurred retrieving meals", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
